base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_push_start_us_2p — a ui from 1980 pac man. USA 2-player variant — PUSH START BUTTON / 1 OR 2 PLAYERS / BONUS PAC-MAN FOR ___ PTS / © 1980 MIDWAY MFG.
